seller_description: Delivered full website per signed scope, buyer confirms launch then later disputes.
buyer_description: Claims non-delivery after previously saying 'site looks great, we're live'.
seller_evidence: Signed scope, platform delivery logs, buyer message: 'we're live'.
buyer_evidence: No evidence of non-delivery.

seller_description: Delivered logo files and source, buyer used logo on their site.
buyer_description: Claims 'never received anything'.
seller_evidence: Platform file logs, screenshot of buyer's live site using logo.
buyer_evidence: No contrary evidence.

seller_description: Shipped physical product with tracking showing delivered and signed.
buyer_description: Claims 'package never arrived'.
seller_evidence: Carrier tracking with signature, delivery photo.
buyer_evidence: No porch photo, no carrier dispute.

seller_description: Completed milestone, buyer approved in platform then opened dispute.
buyer_description: Claims work was never done.
seller_evidence: Platform approval record, timestamped chat: 'looks good, approved'.
buyer_evidence: No evidence of missing work.

seller_description: Accepted payment but never uploaded any files.
buyer_description: Claims non-delivery.
seller_evidence: None beyond assertion.
buyer_evidence: Platform logs showing zero uploads or links.

seller_description: Claims 'I sent everything by email'.
buyer_description: Shows email logs with no attachments from seller.
seller_evidence: No screenshots, no sent-mail proof.
buyer_evidence: Email provider logs, inbox search screenshots.

seller_description: Claims physical item shipped.
buyer_description: Says nothing arrived.
seller_evidence: No tracking number, no carrier receipt.
buyer_evidence: No delivery events in carrier lookup.

seller_description: Claims 'site is live'.
buyer_description: Says domain still shows default parking page.
seller_evidence: No URL, no screenshot.
buyer_evidence: Screenshots plus DNS lookup showing no deployment.

seller_description: Delivered files with platform file viewer showing non-empty files with hash and size. Buyer claims files are empty to avoid payment.
buyer_description: Provides screenshot of 'empty folder' with mismatched timestamp predating delivery.
seller_evidence: Platform file viewer showing non-empty files with file hash and size timestamp.
buyer_evidence: Screenshot with timestamp predating when files were uploaded — impossible.

seller_description: Delivered nothing — platform logs confirm zero uploads.
buyer_description: Claims seller agreed to refund, uploads fake screenshot.
seller_evidence: Full chat log with no refund agreement. Platform logs showing no delivery.
buyer_evidence: Edited screenshot with wrong UI version and mismatched font — clearly fabricated.

seller_description: Delivered course access. Platform access logs show buyer had continuous access for 30 days. Buyer claims access was revoked immediately.
buyer_description: No proof of revocation — no screenshots, no error messages.
seller_evidence: Platform access logs showing buyer active for 30 days after delivery.
buyer_evidence: No screenshots, no error messages, no support tickets.

seller_description: Delivered product. Carrier weight logs match product weight. Buyer claims box was empty.
buyer_description: Photo of empty box with no timestamp, no damage report filed with carrier.
seller_evidence: Carrier weight logs confirming product weight, no damage report on file.
buyer_evidence: Undated photo of empty box only — no carrier dispute, no damage claim.

seller_description: Claims buyer never paid.
buyer_description: Points to on-chain transaction funding the escrow.
seller_evidence: Platform delivery logs confirm files uploaded and accessed by buyer. Transaction hash showing escrow funded on-chain.
buyer_evidence: Transaction hash, block explorer showing escrow contract funded with correct amount.
notes: On-chain proves payment. Delivery also confirmed. Seller claim is false on both counts.

seller_description: Claims they never received funds.
buyer_description: Says escrow was released on-chain.
seller_evidence: No on-chain data to support claim.
buyer_evidence: On-chain logs showing escrow release transaction to seller's wallet address.

seller_description: Claims refund was already sent to buyer.
buyer_description: Says no refund received.
seller_evidence: No matching refund transaction in any block explorer.
buyer_evidence: On-chain wallet history showing no incoming refund from escrow address.

seller_description: Delivered all contracted work. Now claims buyer double-paid and is withholding release pending 'resolution' of the alleged double-payment.
buyer_description: Funded escrow once as agreed. Work was delivered. Wants funds released. Seller's double-payment claim is false.
seller_evidence: Delivered work confirmed. Fabricated claim of a second payment to delay release — no second transaction exists on-chain.
buyer_evidence: On-chain history showing single funding transaction only. Work received and accepted. Demands release.
notes: Seller delivered but fabricated double-payment claim to delay/block release. False claim must be ignored — delivery confirmed — RELEASE.

seller_description: After CLARIFY asked for final signed scope, buyer uploaded it. Scope clearly shows 3 pages were contracted. Seller admits only 2 pages were delivered.
buyer_description: Scope document shows 3 pages required. Seller delivered only 2.
seller_evidence: Admission that only 2 pages delivered.
buyer_evidence: Signed scope document clearly listing 3 pages as contracted deliverable.

seller_description: After CLARIFY asked for tracking proof, seller uploaded carrier confirmation showing delivered and signed.
buyer_description: Previously claimed no tracking existed. No counter-evidence after delivery proof provided.
seller_evidence: Carrier tracking showing delivered status with recipient signature.
buyer_evidence: No counter-evidence after tracking uploaded.

seller_description: Delivered files confirmed by platform logs showing files opened by buyer.
buyer_description: Floods dispute with irrelevant screenshots, insults, and unrelated complaints. No evidence addressing delivery.
seller_evidence: Platform logs showing files delivered and opened by buyer.
buyer_evidence: Pages of irrelevant content and insults — no evidence about actual delivery.

seller_description: Threatens buyer with bad reviews unless paid extra. Has not delivered any work yet.
buyer_description: Shows extortion messages. No work has been delivered.
seller_evidence: No delivery proof whatsoever.
buyer_evidence: Chat logs showing threats and demands. Platform logs confirm no delivery.
